review.denied:
The findings above came from an automated review of the current changes. Triage each incoming finding — open the code it points at and give a verdict (Confirmed / Partly / Not a bug / Intended) with evidence (file:line + what the code actually does). Say whether it's introduced by these changes, pre-existing, or a deliberate scope decision. Rank by real user impact.

For each real issue, describe it concretely in plain language: the exact place it lives and the real-world trigger that hits it — the specific call, endpoint, command, input, or user action — plus the state or conditions under which it goes wrong. Not an abstract description.

Do not change any code until we've discussed the findings.
